title: portal
description: Particle effect based portal | Multi-dimensional tunnels
body:
A plugin that adds virtual portals to the server. 

Portals are made from particle effects. They can be used for quick transportation from location to location.

**Features:**

- Pretty lightweight
- Asynchronous teleportation (Paper-exclusive feature)
- Particle effects
- Multiple destinations per portal
- Portals name-tag (with icons)
- Permission requirement per portal
- Suitable for: hub/lobby, minigame, dungeon, etc

![https://i.imgur.com/a5Q41FR.png](https://i.imgur.com/a5Q41FR.png)

<iframe width="500" height="300" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/xE-TBgcQvPM" title="Portal Plugin" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Commands**
```
/portal reload
/portal list
/portal create <id> [name]
/portal delete <id>
/portal visit <portal>
/portal movehere <portal>
/portal enable <portal>
/portal disable <portal>
/portal connect <source> <destination>
/portal disconnect <source> <destination>
```

**Latest configuration**
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/anhcraft/Portal/master/src/main/resources/config.yml

**Support:**
